stories.title: Physicists demonstrate Hong–Ou–Mandel interference with more than 10 atoms
stories.desc: In a new study published in Nature Physics, researchers have demonstrated the Hong–Ou–Mandel (HOM) effect with up to 12 indistinguishable neutral atoms—an effect that has been predominantly observed in photonic systems.

stories.title: Quantum computer simulates hadronization, reproducing string breaking with 104 qubits
stories.desc: By remotely accessing an IBM quantum computer, a research scientist at Lawrence Berkeley National Laboratory has successfully simulated a key process in particle physics: hadronization. Although based on a simplified model of quantum mechanics, the project lays the groundwork for how physicists can…

stories.title: Minute Man National Historical Park
stories.desc: Sites relevant to the start of the American Revolutionary War are interspersed throughout the modern-day Boston metropolitan region. The post Minute Man National Historical Park appeared first on NASA Science .

stories.title: A Most “Pleasantly Situated” Estate
stories.desc: The farms and gardens of Mount Vernon played a central role in the life of America’s first president. The post A Most “Pleasantly Situated” Estate appeared first on NASA Science .
